a = 'José'
b = 'Jose\u0301'
print('raw', a == b)
print('nfc', unicodedata.normalize('NFC', a) == unicodedata.normalize('NFC', b))
print('causa: NFD residual / formas Unicode distintas')

exercises.code:
import re, unicodedata

def pipeline(name):
    nfc = unicodedata.normalize('NFC', name)
    collapsed = ' '.join(nfc.split())
    return collapsed.casefold()

print(pipeline('  José  QUISPE '))
